name: trackers
description: Tracker skills for Beads and GitHub Issues workflows

interface.longDescription: Bento Trackers packages lightweight issue-management skills for Beads and GitHub Issues so Codex can move from triage to branch creation and follow-up with a consistent workflow.
defaultPrompt: Turn this GitHub issue into an execution plan with clear next actions and branch setup.
Run the Beads issue flow for the current task and summarize the decisions to keep.
Compare tracker state to the repo and point out missing follow-through or stale tasks.
